text: "I also"... The apostle here granted an indulgence, or pardon, in the person and by the authority of Christ, to the incestuous Corinthian, whom before he had put under penance, which pardon consisted in a releasing of part of the temporal punishment due to his sin.

"The odor of death"... The preaching of the apostle, which by its fragrant odor, brought many to life, was to others, through their own fault, the occasion of death; by their wilfully opposing and resisting that divine call.
